title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Matihani
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Matihani assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Political rally in Matihani draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Matihani promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.
